positive: Minimalist geometric celestial scene, featuring a highly stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation of bioluminescent deep blue stars and nebulas, accented by sharp, clean gold foil lines. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, creating a strong, recognizable silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Use a deep indigo background with vibrant electric cyan and gold accents. Highly crisp vector illustration style, high contrast, flat design elements combined with subtle glow effects, studio lighting, print-ready, designed for textile application.
